ideas.title: I Did 2,000 Push-Ups In One Day
ideas.one_line_premise: I push push-ups out one rep at a time in my garage, narrating every sensation in my shoulders until the observation from the last 2,000 lands as a single on-screen sentence.

concept.title: I Did 2,000 Push-Ups In One Day
concept.logline: I push push-ups out one rep at a time in my garage, narrating every sensation in my shoulders until the observation from the last 2,000 lands as a single on-screen sentence.
concept.promise: You're watching me push push-ups out one rep at a time — the question is where one observation replaces every assumption.
concept.payoff: Final 5% of runtime: the observation from the last 2,000 lands as a single on-screen sentence; a single word of reaction lands as overlay.
concept.over_delivery_note: Hook implies a legible answer to the premise (2,000); payoff delivers the reveal as one frame/phrase — specificity of the single shot over-delivers vs the rounded premise.

opening.first_frame: Close on mid-rep with the counter visible. Counter visible. No explanatory overlay; composition emphasizes direct address (rho=0.14 vs log_views).
opening.first_line: Go — 2,000, and my shoulders are going to tell you when it's over.
opening.opening_action: Camera locked on a push-up from the top of the motion for the first 3 seconds; I enter motion inside the first second.

build_phases.beat: enter my garage; a push-up from the top of the motion; premise named on screen
build_phases.note: Concept + body inside first 10%. Design rule v3 #6 (5.4x gap).

build_phases.beat: first shoulders sensation narration ("my shoulders is bigger"); counter begins to tick
build_phases.note: Divergence lock-in at ~22%. Sensory-word ramp begins.

build_phases.beat: escalating a push-up from the top of the motion with sensory updates; utterances < 10 words; no pauses > 1s
build_phases.note: Monotonic rise in distress / counter. Peak-word density increases.

build_phases.beat: peak zone — slow to 3.0 w/s; short sentence on a single sensation; reaction → wide on the count or distance milestone
build_phases.note: Peak 60-80%. Peak-speaking-rate 3.86 wps confirmed; utterance 7.9 words.

build_phases.beat: the observation from the last 2,000 lands as a single on-screen sentence; single-word overlay (sensation); wide shot of the final state
build_phases.note: Golden final 5% + END_RECOVERY. Emotion word in final 10% = +0.069.

climax_and_payoff.climax_hint: At 95% of runtime, the observation from the last 2,000 lands as a single on-screen sentence; camera holds on the final position; I say one word and the overlay freezes.
climax_and_payoff.closing_line_hint: Close with shoulders + impact word: "shoulders's numb — insane."

hook_quarter: a push-up from the top of the motion
mid: alternate shoulders close-ups with a push-up from the top of the motion
text overlay at beat moments only

duration_target.evidence: 50-55s = 2.88M avg views. 40-55s safe range. 15-30s = death zone.

drivers.source: indicator_registry.visual_is_workshop r_direct=+0.236 (42/203 pos, 2.6x); pre_workshop_x_making r_partial=+0.229; tension_x_workshop r_partial=+0.283
top_3_peak_causes.PHYSICAL_SENSORY_LANGUAGE (sensory-rate regression weight +1.59; per-word positive deltas +0.04-0.06 above-baseline in word-retention-impact.json)
tactile frame preserved without triggering TECHNICAL_MATERIAL_LANGUAGE drop cause — sensory > technical axis

creator_fit.note: Creator-fit is added to the combo score so the diversity-aware selector rewards maker/body/workshop alignment at the concrete premise level. Weights derived from indicator strengths above — no hand-curated creator taste beyond what the corpus already implies.

drivers.source: first_frame_action / visual_action_short names a physical artifact or overlay — HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES peak cause (artifact visible in the proof shot)

derived_from_indicators: retention-patterns.top_3_peak_causes.HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES (28% at peaks vs 8% at drops — action frames ARE the proof moment)
proof_clarity.note: Proof-clarity rewards single-shot legible payoffs (build+test hybrids, body before/after anchors, numeric counter freeze + named artifact) and penalizes observation/identity endpoints with no artifact, cognitive/head-framed payoffs, and stacks whose contents are untestable to the viewer. Added to the combo score so the diversity-aware selector and final re-rank both reward mechanism visibility at the concrete premise level. No hand-picked top-5 — every weight reads a factual premise field and cites a corpus indicator.

drivers.source: body_parts lists at least one visible limb/torso — cuts to per-beat close-ups legible; top_3_peak_causes.PHYSICAL_SENSORY_LANGUAGE
physical-action verb stem present in premise copy — the daily act is filmable action; top_3_peak_causes.HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES
first_frame_action names an action verb + at least one of {gauge, physical object} — the challenge is legible at t=0s; HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES peak cause applied at the opening

derived_from_indicators: retention-patterns.top_3_peak_causes.HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES (28% at peaks vs 8% at drops — action frame at t=0s IS comprehension)
visual_legibility.note: Visual-legibility is endpoint-independent. It reads the concrete premise along six axes (invisible body part, cognitive verb without physical action, explicit cognitive surface, title-payoff phrasing, frame-1 comprehensibility, and visual state-contrast) plus an identity/mystery frame-signal check. Designed to catch premises that pass proof-clarity via cosmetic artifact tokens ("stack", "tally", "count overlay") while the actual reveal is a verbal quiz, a social observation, or a cognitive verdict. No rejected category layer — the six axes are factual premise fields plus the title string. No hand-picked top 5.

validated_premise_signature.title_premise_line: I Did {N} Push-Ups In One Day
validated_premise_signature.action_line: push push-ups out one rep at a time

derived_from_lattice: visual_prescription_hints.* ← mechanism_indicator_links (frame_*) ranked by |rho| per zone
creator_fit ← pat_making_v2 + visual_is_workshop + pre_workshop_x_making + tension_x_workshop + PHYSICAL_SENSORY_LANGUAGE vs TECHNICAL_MATERIAL_LANGUAGE + HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES + end_begin_ratio

proof_clarity ← HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES (action frames IS the proof shot) + end_begin_ratio (single-shot before/after) + title_making_keyword (build+test hybrids) + inverse on abstract/cognitive/untestable-stack payoffs

visual_legibility ← HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES (action verb + gauge/object in frame 1) + PHYSICAL_SENSORY_LANGUAGE (visible body_part_phrase) + end_begin_ratio (title reveal phrasing classified physical vs verbal/observational) + visual_is_workshop (state-contrast in visual_action_short) + inverse on invisible body_parts / cognitive verbs / explicit cognitive-surface copy / verbal-reveal titles / non-comprehensible frame-1 / observation-only identity or mystery cuts

final_rank_alternates.note: Top 2 blueprints that lost to this idea during the final MMR re-rank. Rejection reasons: diversity-bucket cap, endpoint-kind cap, or lower MMR(total − λ·sim) against already-ranked slots.

evidence: Hook[compound_frame_close_up_X_segment_setup_at_first_10s] via swipe_away_rate (principle princ_00034, n=65, csw=-0.148).
Structure[late_peak_arc]: Retention pattern: videos peaking at 60-80% get ~10x more views than early-peaking (5.2M vs 530K median).
Structure[golden_final_5pct]: Videos at 95-99% percentile gain +8.0% above baseline vs -0.4% rest.
Structure[visceral_body_language]: Retention gain: painful +5.9%, curious +6.1%, numb +5.0%, stomach +5.1%. Sensory rate weight +1.59 in regression.
Structure[monotonic_rise]: Progression ↑↑↑ = 4.19M vs ↓↓↓ = 222K (19x gap). Every quarter beats the last.
Structure[fast_pacing_no_pauses]: Speech rate r=+0.24 vs retention. Pauses >1s r=-0.22. Transitions ('so', 'however') drop -11.2% / -8.6%.
Structure[nadir_before_climax]: best_after_worst 3.3M vs best_before_worst 650K (5x).
Duration[sweet_spot_46_60] 52s: 50-55s = 2.88M avg views. 40-55s safe range. 15-30s = death zone.
Pre-upload lever[hook_word_ratio]: r=-0.2693, lower → more views.
Pre-upload lever[visual_variety_entropy]: r=0.2692, higher → more views.
Pre-upload lever[transcript_word_count]: r=0.2639, higher → more views.
Pre-upload lever[transcript_char_count]: r=0.2557, higher → more views.

top_indicators.quantification: The gap between hook above_baseline and payoff above_baseline. NEGATIVE correlation = over-delivery wins. Videos where the ending exceeds the hook promise get 9x more views.
top_indicators.design_rule: The ending MUST exceed the opening promise. Never frontload your best content. Build to a climax that surpasses the hook.

top_indicators.quantification: Above-baseline retention at 80-95% of the video. The single strongest zone predictor. Q4 videos average +0.055 here while Q1 averages -0.089.
top_indicators.design_rule: Save the biggest payoff for the final 15%. The ending matters 8.5x more than the hook for total views.

top_indicators.quantification: Longest sustained run of above-baseline retention. Mean run = 50 points. % time above baseline also r=+0.47. Sustained quality > dramatic peaks.
top_indicators.design_rule: Consistency beats spikes. One long above-baseline run is worth more than multiple isolated peaks.

top_indicators.quantification: Later drops are 2.15x steeper than early drops (-0.129 vs -0.060). And late drops are almost never recovered (3/472). Position × severity interaction.
top_indicators.design_rule: A drop at 70% is fatal. A drop at 20% can be recovered. Front-load any risky content.

top_indicators.quantification: MORE retention peaks = FEWER views. Fewer, bigger dramatic moments > many small ones. Peak/drop ratio also inversely predicts (r=-0.33).
top_indicators.design_rule: Don't try to pack in multiple peaks. Build one clear narrative arc with one major payoff.

top_indicators.rule: NEVER name materials. Show the result, not the process. 'Watch what happens' > 'I used carbon fiber reinforced with graphene layers'.

top_indicators.key: risk:face + text without action (talking head trap)
top_indicators.effect_size: Face 0.31 higher at drops, Text 0.33 higher at drops
top_indicators.quantification: GPT-4o-mini vision: face more visible at drops (3.51) than peaks (3.20). Text more present at drops (3.73 vs 3.40). Face alone doesn't retain — face + explaining + text = drop. Face + action = peak.
top_indicators.rule: Never have Tyler just talking to camera with text overlays. If his face is on screen, he must be DOING something physical.
top_indicators.why: GPT-4o-mini vision: face more visible at drops (3.51) than peaks (3.20). Text more present at drops (3.73 vs 3.40). Face alone doesn't retain — face + explaining + text = drop. Face + action = peak.

top_indicators.quantification: Viewer fatigue r=-0.31: later drops 2.15x steeper. Only 3/472 late drops were recovered. Once viewers start leaving in the back half, they don't come back.
top_indicators.rule: Never put boring content after 60%. Any setup/explanation must happen in the first 30%. The back half must be pure payoff.
top_indicators.why: Viewer fatigue r=-0.31: later drops 2.15x steeper. Only 3/472 late drops were recovered. Once viewers start leaving in the back half, they don't come back.

top_indicators.quantification: Top quartile videos have worst moment at 17%. Bottom quartile at 49%. Successful videos front-load their worst content where it's recoverable.
top_indicators.rule: Put your weakest/setup content in the first 20%. Never let the worst moment happen after 30%.
top_indicators.why: Top quartile videos have worst moment at 17%. Bottom quartile at 49%. Successful videos front-load their worst content where it's recoverable.

top_indicators.quantification: phrases like "link in bio" / "see what happens" / "on my profile" are enriched at drops
top_indicators.rule: avoid drop phrases; prefer peak phrases ("in the comments", "should I keep", "i keep going")
top_indicators.why: phrases like "link in bio" / "see what happens" / "on my profile" are enriched at drops

top_indicators.rule: avoid stakes-based framing ("if this fails…") — use transformation or mystery
verbal energy drives retention more than visual. Pair visual beats with spoken sensory language.

creator_fit.rationale: Creator-fit is derived purely from corpus indicators that empirically prefer maker/body/workshop DNA: title-level making/build keywords (pat_making_v2, title_making_keyword), workshop/hands-visible framing (visual_is_workshop, pre_workshop_x_making, tension_x_workshop), sensory-over-technical language (top peak/drop causes), and feasible single-shot visible-proof endpoints (HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES, end_begin_ratio). Every weight in computeCreatorFit() cites a specific indicator; no hand-curated creator taste is added beyond what these indicators already imply.

creator_fit.selection_effect: Added to the combo score so the diversity pass and MMR fill both reward maker/body/workshop alignment at the concrete premise level.

proof_clarity.rationale: Proof-clarity rewards ideas with a single-shot legible payoff: build+test hybrids (verb combo match), body-transformation with an explicit before/after anchor (same shot / weigh-in / day 1 vs day N), numeric endpoints with a named artifact in frame (counter/overlay/stack/tower/hull/pedals). Penalizes abstract observation/identity payoffs without artifacts, head/feeling-framed low-action payoffs, and repetition_outreach stacks whose contents are untestable to the viewer. The signal is factual — it reads the title premise line, logline_action, first_frame_action, visual_action_short, endpoint.kind, action_intensity, and body_part_phrase — not taste.

top_indicators.quantification: Action-frame share at best vs worst moments (28% vs 8%)
top_indicators.why: the proof MOMENT is an action frame — visible build/test/body/counter state in one shot
single-shot before/after / build-test / counter-freeze payoff structure
body/physical payoff reads on camera; cognitive payoff does not
object interaction makes the proof legible vs face-only reaction

proof_clarity.selection_effect: Added to the combo score so the diversity pass, MMR fill, AND the final blueprint re-rank all reward single-shot visible proof at the concrete premise level.

visual_legibility.rationale: Visual-legibility is endpoint-independent. It reads the concrete premise on six axes — (1) invisible body_part_phrase, (2) cognitive verb without a physical-action verb, (3) explicit cognitive-surface copy, (4) title premise line reveal phrasing classified physical-reveal vs verbal/observational, (5) frame-1 comprehensibility (action verb + gauge/object in first_frame_action), (6) state-contrast in visual_action_short — plus a mystery/identity frame-signal check. Designed to catch premises that gamed proof-clarity via cosmetic proof tokens ("stack of flashcards", "tally", "count overlay") while the actual reveal was a verbal quiz, a social observation, or a cognitive verdict. Every driver exposes the matched phrase or stem and cites an on-disk corpus indicator; no rejected category layer; no hand-picked top 5.

top_indicators.quantification: Action frames appear 28% at peaks vs 8% at drops
top_indicators.why: frame-1 comprehensibility IS an action frame at t=0s — action verb in first_frame_action is the opening-second proxy for this cause
visible body_part_phrase (foot/shoulders/stomach/hand) has a surface to film; feeling/head/mind/brain/memory do not
title premise line reveal phrasing classified: physical single-shot reveals align, verbal/observational reveals regress
state-contrast in visual_action_short (cut between, growing stack, slides out, pedals turning) is the hands-on-object axis applied across the build

summary.note: Raw totals sum across traces and can double-count indicators reused in multiple sections. "unique_indicator_keys_used" deduplicates.

why_it_works: Specific premise (I Did 2,000 Push-Ups In One Day) — every concrete choice (object, timer, endpoint) survives the validation filter below.
Arc = steady_rise with nadir placed at ~17% (best_after_worst 5x gap).
Hook-retention@20s modeled high (86.8%) — first-20s is the single strongest view predictor (r=0.6).
Over-delivery structure: hook promises less than the 95% payoff delivers (hook_payoff_gap rewards over-delivery, r=-0.52).
Vocabulary: commits to 8 peak words and avoids 6 material-class words.

Proof-clarity: score=0.12 from 1 drivers (build+test hybrid, body before/after anchor, numeric counter + named artifact) — single-shot legible payoff backed by HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES + end_begin_ratio.

Visual-legibility: score=0.32 from 3 drivers (+3/-0) — frame-1 comprehensibility + decisive physical reveal in title + state-contrast in the cut-to; penalizes invisible body parts, cognitive verbs, and verbal/observational reveals regardless of endpoint kind.
Validation trace: 19 blueprint sections and 5 modeled metrics carry explicit indicator lineage (pool size, filter, top indicators w/ r/rho/csw and quantification).

ideas.title: I Climbed A Single Flight Of Stairs 1,000 Times — The Counter Froze At 1,028
ideas.one_line_premise: I run up a single flight of stairs in a stairwell, narrating every sensation in my foot until the counter freezes at 1,028.

concept.title: I Climbed A Single Flight Of Stairs 1,000 Times — The Counter Froze At 1,028
concept.logline: I run up a single flight of stairs in a stairwell, narrating every sensation in my foot until the counter freezes at 1,028.
concept.promise: You're watching me run up a single flight of stairs — the question is where the counter lands on a specific number.
concept.payoff: Final 5% of runtime: the counter freezes at 1,028; a single sensation word appears as overlay.
concept.over_delivery_note: Hook implies a round target (1,000); payoff lands on a specific, non-round value (1,028) — specificity over-delivers vs the rounded promise.

opening.first_frame: Close on mid-step on the stairs with a counter overlay. Counter visible. No explanatory overlay; composition emphasizes direct address (rho=0.14 vs log_views).
opening.first_line: Go — 1,000, and my foot is going to tell you when it's over.
opening.opening_action: Camera locked on running up a flight with foot-on-stair visible for the first 3 seconds; I enter motion inside the first second.

build_phases.beat: enter a stairwell; running up a flight with foot-on-stair visible; premise named on screen
build_phases.note: Concept + body inside first 10%. Design rule v3 #6 (5.4x gap).

build_phases.beat: first foot sensation narration ("my foot is bigger"); counter begins to tick
build_phases.note: Divergence lock-in at ~22%. Sensory-word ramp begins.

build_phases.beat: escalating running up a flight with foot-on-stair visible with sensory updates; utterances < 10 words; no pauses > 1s
build_phases.note: Monotonic rise in distress / counter. Peak-word density increases.

build_phases.beat: peak zone — slow to 3.0 w/s; short sentence on a single sensation; reaction → wide on the count or distance milestone
build_phases.note: Peak 60-80%. Peak-speaking-rate 3.86 wps confirmed; utterance 7.9 words.

build_phases.beat: the counter freezes at 1,028; single-word overlay (sensation); wide shot of the final state
build_phases.note: Golden final 5% + END_RECOVERY. Emotion word in final 10% = +0.069.

climax_and_payoff.climax_hint: At 95% of runtime, the counter freezes at 1,028; camera holds on the final position; I say one word and the overlay freezes.
climax_and_payoff.closing_line_hint: Close with foot + impact word: "foot's numb — insane."

first_5s: mid-step on the stairs with a counter overlay
hook_quarter: running up a flight with foot-on-stair visible
mid: alternate foot close-ups with running up a flight with foot-on-stair visible
text overlay at beat moments only

duration_target.evidence: 50-55s = 2.88M avg views. 40-55s safe range. 15-30s = death zone.

evidence: Hook[compound_frame_close_up_X_segment_setup_at_first_10s] via swipe_away_rate (principle princ_00034, n=65, csw=-0.148).
Structure[late_peak_arc]: Retention pattern: videos peaking at 60-80% get ~10x more views than early-peaking (5.2M vs 530K median).
Structure[golden_final_5pct]: Videos at 95-99% percentile gain +8.0% above baseline vs -0.4% rest.
Structure[visceral_body_language]: Retention gain: painful +5.9%, curious +6.1%, numb +5.0%, stomach +5.1%. Sensory rate weight +1.59 in regression.
Structure[monotonic_rise]: Progression ↑↑↑ = 4.19M vs ↓↓↓ = 222K (19x gap). Every quarter beats the last.
Structure[fast_pacing_no_pauses]: Speech rate r=+0.24 vs retention. Pauses >1s r=-0.22. Transitions ('so', 'however') drop -11.2% / -8.6%.
Structure[nadir_before_climax]: best_after_worst 3.3M vs best_before_worst 650K (5x).
Duration[sweet_spot_46_60] 52s: 50-55s = 2.88M avg views. 40-55s safe range. 15-30s = death zone.
Pre-upload lever[hook_word_ratio]: r=-0.2693, lower → more views.
Pre-upload lever[visual_variety_entropy]: r=0.2692, higher → more views.
Pre-upload lever[transcript_word_count]: r=0.2639, higher → more views.
Pre-upload lever[transcript_char_count]: r=0.2557, higher → more views.

top_indicators.quantification: The gap between hook above_baseline and payoff above_baseline. NEGATIVE correlation = over-delivery wins. Videos where the ending exceeds the hook promise get 9x more views.
top_indicators.design_rule: The ending MUST exceed the opening promise. Never frontload your best content. Build to a climax that surpasses the hook.

top_indicators.quantification: Above-baseline retention at 80-95% of the video. The single strongest zone predictor. Q4 videos average +0.055 here while Q1 averages -0.089.
top_indicators.design_rule: Save the biggest payoff for the final 15%. The ending matters 8.5x more than the hook for total views.

top_indicators.quantification: Longest sustained run of above-baseline retention. Mean run = 50 points. % time above baseline also r=+0.47. Sustained quality > dramatic peaks.
top_indicators.design_rule: Consistency beats spikes. One long above-baseline run is worth more than multiple isolated peaks.

top_indicators.quantification: Later drops are 2.15x steeper than early drops (-0.129 vs -0.060). And late drops are almost never recovered (3/472). Position × severity interaction.
top_indicators.design_rule: A drop at 70% is fatal. A drop at 20% can be recovered. Front-load any risky content.

top_indicators.quantification: MORE retention peaks = FEWER views. Fewer, bigger dramatic moments > many small ones. Peak/drop ratio also inversely predicts (r=-0.33).
top_indicators.design_rule: Don't try to pack in multiple peaks. Build one clear narrative arc with one major payoff.

top_indicators.quantification: GPT-4o-mini vision: face more visible at drops (3.51) than peaks (3.20). Text more present at drops (3.73 vs 3.40). Face alone doesn't retain — face + explaining + text = drop. Face + action = peak.
top_indicators.rule: Never have Tyler just talking to camera with text overlays. If his face is on screen, he must be DOING something physical.

creator_fit.rationale: Creator-fit is derived purely from corpus indicators that empirically prefer maker/body/workshop DNA: title-level making/build keywords (pat_making_v2, title_making_keyword), workshop/hands-visible framing (visual_is_workshop, pre_workshop_x_making, tension_x_workshop), sensory-over-technical language (top peak/drop causes), and feasible single-shot visible-proof endpoints (HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES, end_begin_ratio). Every weight in computeCreatorFit() cites a specific indicator; no hand-curated creator taste is added beyond what these indicators already imply.

tactile frame preserved without triggering TECHNICAL_MATERIAL_LANGUAGE drop cause — sensory > technical axis
HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES peak cause + wave11_12.end_begin_ratio (numeric counter freeze = single-shot visible payoff)

creator_fit.selection_effect: Added to the combo score so the diversity pass and MMR fill both reward maker/body/workshop alignment at the concrete premise level.

proof_clarity.rationale: Proof-clarity rewards ideas with a single-shot legible payoff: build+test hybrids (verb combo match), body-transformation with an explicit before/after anchor (same shot / weigh-in / day 1 vs day N), numeric endpoints with a named artifact in frame (counter/overlay/stack/tower/hull/pedals). Penalizes abstract observation/identity payoffs without artifacts, head/feeling-framed low-action payoffs, and repetition_outreach stacks whose contents are untestable to the viewer. The signal is factual — it reads the title premise line, logline_action, first_frame_action, visual_action_short, endpoint.kind, action_intensity, and body_part_phrase — not taste.

top_indicators.quantification: Action-frame share at best vs worst moments (28% vs 8%)
top_indicators.why: the proof MOMENT is an action frame — visible build/test/body/counter state in one shot
single-shot before/after / build-test / counter-freeze payoff structure
body/physical payoff reads on camera; cognitive payoff does not
object interaction makes the proof legible vs face-only reaction

proof_clarity.filter: factual premise fields × endpoint kind — each driver exposes the matched verb/anchor/artifact and the corpus indicator it cites

drivers_triggered.source: top_3_peak_causes.HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES + wave11_12.end_begin_ratio — numeric counter freeze is single-shot legible proof
first_frame_action / visual_action_short names a physical artifact or overlay — HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES peak cause (artifact visible in the proof shot)

proof_clarity.selection_effect: Added to the combo score so the diversity pass, MMR fill, AND the final blueprint re-rank all reward single-shot visible proof at the concrete premise level.

visual_legibility.rationale: Visual-legibility is endpoint-independent. It reads the concrete premise on six axes — (1) invisible body_part_phrase, (2) cognitive verb without a physical-action verb, (3) explicit cognitive-surface copy, (4) title premise line reveal phrasing classified physical-reveal vs verbal/observational, (5) frame-1 comprehensibility (action verb + gauge/object in first_frame_action), (6) state-contrast in visual_action_short — plus a mystery/identity frame-signal check. Designed to catch premises that gamed proof-clarity via cosmetic proof tokens ("stack of flashcards", "tally", "count overlay") while the actual reveal was a verbal quiz, a social observation, or a cognitive verdict. Every driver exposes the matched phrase or stem and cites an on-disk corpus indicator; no rejected category layer; no hand-picked top 5.

top_indicators.quantification: Action frames appear 28% at peaks vs 8% at drops
top_indicators.why: frame-1 comprehensibility IS an action frame at t=0s — action verb in first_frame_action is the opening-second proxy for this cause
visible body_part_phrase (foot/shoulders/stomach/hand) has a surface to film; feeling/head/mind/brain/memory do not
title premise line reveal phrasing classified: physical single-shot reveals align, verbal/observational reveals regress
state-contrast in visual_action_short (cut between, growing stack, slides out, pedals turning) is the hands-on-object axis applied across the build

top_indicators.quantification: Title contains making/build/creat/construct — 34 videos avg 19.7M vs 5.6M

endpoint is numeric/body/build_test AND the premise has no builtin reveal — composeTitle() appends a single-frame freeze ("The Counter Froze At N" / "The Timer Hit N Exactly" / "The Mile Counter Froze At N" / "My {part} Quit First" / "The Build Held Until N"); wave11_12.end_begin_ratio

visual_legibility.selection_effect: Added to the combo score alongside proof_clarity so the diversity-aware selector, MMR fill, AND the final blueprint re-rank all push cognitive/abstract/verbal-reveal premises below zero before any top-5 slot is assigned.

summary.note: Raw totals sum across traces and can double-count indicators reused in multiple sections. "unique_indicator_keys_used" deduplicates.

why_it_works: Specific premise (I Climbed A Single Flight Of Stairs 1,000 Times — The Counter Froze At 1,028) — every concrete choice (object, timer, endpoint) survives the validation filter below.
Arc = steady_rise with nadir placed at ~17% (best_after_worst 5x gap).
Hook-retention@20s modeled high (86.8%) — first-20s is the single strongest view predictor (r=0.6).
Over-delivery structure: hook promises less than the 95% payoff delivers (hook_payoff_gap rewards over-delivery, r=-0.52).
Vocabulary: commits to 9 peak words and avoids 6 material-class words.

Proof-clarity: score=0.34 from 2 drivers (build+test hybrid, body before/after anchor, numeric counter + named artifact) — single-shot legible payoff backed by HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES + end_begin_ratio.

Visual-legibility: score=0.56 from 4 drivers (+4/-0) — frame-1 comprehensibility + decisive physical reveal in title + state-contrast in the cut-to; penalizes invisible body parts, cognitive verbs, and verbal/observational reveals regardless of endpoint kind.
Validation trace: 19 blueprint sections and 5 modeled metrics carry explicit indicator lineage (pool size, filter, top indicators w/ r/rho/csw and quantification).

ideas.title: I Trained With A Pro Boxer For One Full Day — He Told Me When To Stop
ideas.one_line_premise: I shadow a professional boxer through every single thing he does in his training day — warm-up, bag work, sparring, ice, food inside a pro fighter’s actual gym, narrating every sensation in my shoulders until the person I shadowed decides out loud when my day is over.

concept.title: I Trained With A Pro Boxer For One Full Day — He Told Me When To Stop
concept.logline: I shadow a professional boxer through every single thing he does in his training day — warm-up, bag work, sparring, ice, food inside a pro fighter’s actual gym, narrating every sensation in my shoulders until the person I shadowed decides out loud when my day is over.
concept.promise: You're watching me shadow a professional boxer through every single thing he does in his training day — warm-up, bag work, sparring, ice, food — the question is where the person I shadowed says we’re done.
concept.payoff: Final 5% of runtime: the person I shadowed decides out loud when my day is over; a single word of reaction lands as overlay.
concept.over_delivery_note: Hook implies a legible answer to the premise (2 days); payoff delivers the reveal as one frame/phrase — specificity of the single shot over-delivers vs the rounded premise.

opening.first_frame: Close on a pro boxer wrapping my hands with his gym behind him in the same frame. Counter visible. No explanatory overlay; composition emphasizes direct address (rho=0.14 vs log_views).
opening.first_line: Go — 2 days, and my shoulders are going to tell you when it's over.
opening.opening_action: Camera locked on matching his bag work beat for beat with both fighters in the shot for the first 3 seconds; I enter motion inside the first second.

build_phases.beat: enter inside a pro fighter’s actual gym; matching his bag work beat for beat with both fighters in the shot; premise named on screen
build_phases.note: Concept + body inside first 10%. Design rule v3 #6 (5.4x gap).

build_phases.beat: first shoulders sensation narration ("my shoulders is bigger"); counter begins to tick
build_phases.note: Divergence lock-in at ~22%. Sensory-word ramp begins.

build_phases.beat: escalating matching his bag work beat for beat with both fighters in the shot with sensory updates; utterances < 10 words; no pauses > 1s
build_phases.note: Monotonic rise in distress / counter. Peak-word density increases.

build_phases.beat: peak zone — slow to 3.0 w/s; short sentence on a single sensation; reaction → wide on the count or distance milestone
build_phases.note: Peak 60-80%. Peak-speaking-rate 3.86 wps confirmed; utterance 7.9 words.

build_phases.beat: the person I shadowed decides out loud when my day is over; single-word overlay (sensation); wide shot of the final state
build_phases.note: Golden final 5% + END_RECOVERY. Emotion word in final 10% = +0.069.

climax_and_payoff.climax_hint: At 95% of runtime, the person I shadowed decides out loud when my day is over; camera holds on the final position; I say one word and the overlay freezes.
climax_and_payoff.closing_line_hint: Close with shoulders + impact word: "shoulders's numb — insane."

first_5s: a pro boxer wrapping my hands with his gym behind him in the same frame
hook_quarter: matching his bag work beat for beat with both fighters in the shot
mid: alternate shoulders close-ups with matching his bag work beat for beat with both fighters in the shot
text overlay at beat moments only

duration_target.evidence: 50-55s = 2.88M avg views. 40-55s safe range. 15-30s = death zone.

drivers.source: indicator_registry.visual_is_workshop r_direct=+0.236 (42/203 pos, 2.6x); pre_workshop_x_making r_partial=+0.229; tension_x_workshop r_partial=+0.283
top_3_peak_causes.PHYSICAL_SENSORY_LANGUAGE (sensory-rate regression weight +1.59; per-word positive deltas +0.04-0.06 above-baseline in word-retention-impact.json)
tactile frame preserved without triggering TECHNICAL_MATERIAL_LANGUAGE drop cause — sensory > technical axis

creator_fit.note: Creator-fit is added to the combo score so the diversity-aware selector rewards maker/body/workshop alignment at the concrete premise level. Weights derived from indicator strengths above — no hand-curated creator taste beyond what the corpus already implies.

drivers.source: endpoint is experiment/identity and no single-frame artifact is named — inverse of HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES + inverse of end_begin_ratio (payoff reads only with context)
HANDS_VISIBLE match in visual_action_short / first_frame_action — indicator_registry.visual_is_workshop axis (hands-on-object framing)

derived_from_indicators: retention-patterns.top_3_peak_causes.HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES (28% at peaks vs 8% at drops — action frames ARE the proof moment)
proof_clarity.note: Proof-clarity rewards single-shot legible payoffs (build+test hybrids, body before/after anchors, numeric counter freeze + named artifact) and penalizes observation/identity endpoints with no artifact, cognitive/head-framed payoffs, and stacks whose contents are untestable to the viewer. Added to the combo score so the diversity-aware selector and final re-rank both reward mechanism visibility at the concrete premise level. No hand-picked top-5 — every weight reads a factual premise field and cites a corpus indicator.

drivers.source: body_parts lists at least one visible limb/torso — cuts to per-beat close-ups legible; top_3_peak_causes.PHYSICAL_SENSORY_LANGUAGE
physical-action verb stem present in premise copy — the daily act is filmable action; top_3_peak_causes.HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES
title premise line signals a single-frame payoff (same-shot / weigh-in / freeze-frame / break point / call-it moment) — wave11_12.end_begin_ratio (single-shot end-over-start reveal)
first_frame_action names an action verb + at least one of {gauge, physical object} — the challenge is legible at t=0s; HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES peak cause applied at the opening

derived_from_indicators: retention-patterns.top_3_peak_causes.HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES (28% at peaks vs 8% at drops — action frame at t=0s IS comprehension)
visual_legibility.note: Visual-legibility is endpoint-independent. It reads the concrete premise along six axes (invisible body part, cognitive verb without physical action, explicit cognitive surface, title-payoff phrasing, frame-1 comprehensibility, and visual state-contrast) plus an identity/mystery frame-signal check. Designed to catch premises that pass proof-clarity via cosmetic artifact tokens ("stack", "tally", "count overlay") while the actual reveal is a verbal quiz, a social observation, or a cognitive verdict. No rejected category layer — the six axes are factual premise fields plus the title string. No hand-picked top 5.

final_rank_alternates.note: Top 2 blueprints that lost to this idea during the final MMR re-rank. Rejection reasons: diversity-bucket cap, endpoint-kind cap, or lower MMR(total − λ·sim) against already-ranked slots.

evidence: Hook[compound_frame_close_up_X_segment_setup_at_first_10s] via swipe_away_rate (principle princ_00034, n=65, csw=-0.148).
Structure[late_peak_arc]: Retention pattern: videos peaking at 60-80% get ~10x more views than early-peaking (5.2M vs 530K median).
Structure[golden_final_5pct]: Videos at 95-99% percentile gain +8.0% above baseline vs -0.4% rest.
Structure[visceral_body_language]: Retention gain: painful +5.9%, curious +6.1%, numb +5.0%, stomach +5.1%. Sensory rate weight +1.59 in regression.
Structure[monotonic_rise]: Progression ↑↑↑ = 4.19M vs ↓↓↓ = 222K (19x gap). Every quarter beats the last.
Structure[fast_pacing_no_pauses]: Speech rate r=+0.24 vs retention. Pauses >1s r=-0.22. Transitions ('so', 'however') drop -11.2% / -8.6%.
Structure[nadir_before_climax]: best_after_worst 3.3M vs best_before_worst 650K (5x).
Duration[sweet_spot_46_60] 52s: 50-55s = 2.88M avg views. 40-55s safe range. 15-30s = death zone.
Pre-upload lever[hook_word_ratio]: r=-0.2693, lower → more views.
Pre-upload lever[visual_variety_entropy]: r=0.2692, higher → more views.
Pre-upload lever[transcript_word_count]: r=0.2639, higher → more views.
Pre-upload lever[transcript_char_count]: r=0.2557, higher → more views.

top_indicators.quantification: The gap between hook above_baseline and payoff above_baseline. NEGATIVE correlation = over-delivery wins. Videos where the ending exceeds the hook promise get 9x more views.
top_indicators.design_rule: The ending MUST exceed the opening promise. Never frontload your best content. Build to a climax that surpasses the hook.

top_indicators.quantification: Above-baseline retention at 80-95% of the video. The single strongest zone predictor. Q4 videos average +0.055 here while Q1 averages -0.089.
top_indicators.design_rule: Save the biggest payoff for the final 15%. The ending matters 8.5x more than the hook for total views.

top_indicators.quantification: Longest sustained run of above-baseline retention. Mean run = 50 points. % time above baseline also r=+0.47. Sustained quality > dramatic peaks.
top_indicators.design_rule: Consistency beats spikes. One long above-baseline run is worth more than multiple isolated peaks.

top_indicators.quantification: Later drops are 2.15x steeper than early drops (-0.129 vs -0.060). And late drops are almost never recovered (3/472). Position × severity interaction.
top_indicators.design_rule: A drop at 70% is fatal. A drop at 20% can be recovered. Front-load any risky content.

top_indicators.quantification: MORE retention peaks = FEWER views. Fewer, bigger dramatic moments > many small ones. Peak/drop ratio also inversely predicts (r=-0.33).
top_indicators.design_rule: Don't try to pack in multiple peaks. Build one clear narrative arc with one major payoff.

top_indicators.quantification: GPT-4o-mini vision: face more visible at drops (3.51) than peaks (3.20). Text more present at drops (3.73 vs 3.40). Face alone doesn't retain — face + explaining + text = drop. Face + action = peak.
top_indicators.rule: Never have Tyler just talking to camera with text overlays. If his face is on screen, he must be DOING something physical.
top_indicators.why: GPT-4o-mini vision: face more visible at drops (3.51) than peaks (3.20). Text more present at drops (3.73 vs 3.40). Face alone doesn't retain — face + explaining + text = drop. Face + action = peak.

top_indicators.quantification: Viewer fatigue r=-0.31: later drops 2.15x steeper. Only 3/472 late drops were recovered. Once viewers start leaving in the back half, they don't come back.
top_indicators.rule: Never put boring content after 60%. Any setup/explanation must happen in the first 30%. The back half must be pure payoff.
top_indicators.why: Viewer fatigue r=-0.31: later drops 2.15x steeper. Only 3/472 late drops were recovered. Once viewers start leaving in the back half, they don't come back.

creator_fit.rationale: Creator-fit is derived purely from corpus indicators that empirically prefer maker/body/workshop DNA: title-level making/build keywords (pat_making_v2, title_making_keyword), workshop/hands-visible framing (visual_is_workshop, pre_workshop_x_making, tension_x_workshop), sensory-over-technical language (top peak/drop causes), and feasible single-shot visible-proof endpoints (HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES, end_begin_ratio). Every weight in computeCreatorFit() cites a specific indicator; no hand-curated creator taste is added beyond what these indicators already imply.

proof_clarity.rationale: Proof-clarity rewards ideas with a single-shot legible payoff: build+test hybrids (verb combo match), body-transformation with an explicit before/after anchor (same shot / weigh-in / day 1 vs day N), numeric endpoints with a named artifact in frame (counter/overlay/stack/tower/hull/pedals). Penalizes abstract observation/identity payoffs without artifacts, head/feeling-framed low-action payoffs, and repetition_outreach stacks whose contents are untestable to the viewer. The signal is factual — it reads the title premise line, logline_action, first_frame_action, visual_action_short, endpoint.kind, action_intensity, and body_part_phrase — not taste.

top_indicators.quantification: Action-frame share at best vs worst moments (28% vs 8%)

object interaction makes the proof legible vs face-only reaction

visual_legibility.rationale: Visual-legibility is endpoint-independent. It reads the concrete premise on six axes — (1) invisible body_part_phrase, (2) cognitive verb without a physical-action verb, (3) explicit cognitive-surface copy, (4) title premise line reveal phrasing classified physical-reveal vs verbal/observational, (5) frame-1 comprehensibility (action verb + gauge/object in first_frame_action), (6) state-contrast in visual_action_short — plus a mystery/identity frame-signal check. Designed to catch premises that gamed proof-clarity via cosmetic proof tokens ("stack of flashcards", "tally", "count overlay") while the actual reveal was a verbal quiz, a social observation, or a cognitive verdict. Every driver exposes the matched phrase or stem and cites an on-disk corpus indicator; no rejected category layer; no hand-picked top 5.

title premise line reveal phrasing classified: physical single-shot reveals align, verbal/observational reveals regress
state-contrast in visual_action_short (cut between, growing stack, slides out, pedals turning) is the hands-on-object axis applied across the build

summary.note: Raw totals sum across traces and can double-count indicators reused in multiple sections. "unique_indicator_keys_used" deduplicates.

why_it_works: Specific premise (I Trained With A Pro Boxer For One Full Day — He Told Me When To Stop) — every concrete choice (object, timer, endpoint) survives the validation filter below.
Arc = steady_rise with nadir placed at ~17% (best_after_worst 5x gap).
Hook-retention@20s modeled high (86.8%) — first-20s is the single strongest view predictor (r=0.6).
Over-delivery structure: hook promises less than the 95% payoff delivers (hook_payoff_gap rewards over-delivery, r=-0.52).
Vocabulary: commits to 9 peak words and avoids 6 material-class words.

Proof-clarity: score=-0.32 from 2 drivers (build+test hybrid, body before/after anchor, numeric counter + named artifact) — single-shot legible payoff backed by HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES + end_begin_ratio.

Visual-legibility: score=0.52 from 4 drivers (+4/-0) — frame-1 comprehensibility + decisive physical reveal in title + state-contrast in the cut-to; penalizes invisible body parts, cognitive verbs, and verbal/observational reveals regardless of endpoint kind.
Validation trace: 19 blueprint sections and 5 modeled metrics carry explicit indicator lineage (pool size, filter, top indicators w/ r/rho/csw and quantification).

ideas.title: I Marched With A Weighted Backpack For 30 Miles — The Mile Counter Froze At 30.3 miles
ideas.one_line_premise: I march with a weighted backpack step by step on a marked road, narrating every sensation in my foot until the mile counter freezes at 30.3 miles.

concept.title: I Marched With A Weighted Backpack For 30 Miles — The Mile Counter Froze At 30.3 miles
concept.logline: I march with a weighted backpack step by step on a marked road, narrating every sensation in my foot until the mile counter freezes at 30.3 miles.
concept.promise: You're watching me march with a weighted backpack step by step — the question is where the counter lands on a specific number.
concept.payoff: Final 5% of runtime: the mile counter freezes at 30.3 miles; a single sensation word appears as overlay.
concept.over_delivery_note: Hook implies a round target (30 miles); payoff lands on a specific, non-round value (30.3 miles) — specificity over-delivers vs the rounded promise.

opening.first_frame: Close on boots hitting pavement with a loaded pack on my back. Counter visible. No explanatory overlay; composition emphasizes direct address (rho=0.14 vs log_views).
opening.first_line: Go — 30 miles, and my foot is going to tell you when it's over.
opening.opening_action: Camera locked on boots in motion with a mile-counter overlay for the first 3 seconds; I enter motion inside the first second.

build_phases.beat: enter a marked road; boots in motion with a mile-counter overlay; premise named on screen
build_phases.note: Concept + body inside first 10%. Design rule v3 #6 (5.4x gap).

build_phases.beat: first foot sensation narration ("my foot is bigger"); counter begins to tick
build_phases.note: Divergence lock-in at ~22%. Sensory-word ramp begins.

build_phases.beat: escalating boots in motion with a mile-counter overlay with sensory updates; utterances < 10 words; no pauses > 1s
build_phases.note: Monotonic rise in distress / counter. Peak-word density increases.

build_phases.beat: peak zone — slow to 3.0 w/s; short sentence on a single sensation; reaction → wide on the count or distance milestone
build_phases.note: Peak 60-80%. Peak-speaking-rate 3.86 wps confirmed; utterance 7.9 words.

build_phases.beat: the mile counter freezes at 30.3 miles; single-word overlay (sensation); wide shot of the final state
build_phases.note: Golden final 5% + END_RECOVERY. Emotion word in final 10% = +0.069.

climax_and_payoff.climax_hint: At 95% of runtime, the mile counter freezes at 30.3 miles; camera holds on the final position; I say one word and the overlay freezes.
climax_and_payoff.closing_line_hint: Close with foot + impact word: "foot's numb — insane."

first_5s: boots hitting pavement with a loaded pack on my back
hook_quarter: boots in motion with a mile-counter overlay
mid: alternate foot close-ups with boots in motion with a mile-counter overlay
text overlay at beat moments only

duration_target.evidence: 50-55s = 2.88M avg views. 40-55s safe range. 15-30s = death zone.

evidence: Hook[compound_frame_close_up_X_segment_setup_at_first_10s] via swipe_away_rate (principle princ_00034, n=65, csw=-0.148).
Structure[late_peak_arc]: Retention pattern: videos peaking at 60-80% get ~10x more views than early-peaking (5.2M vs 530K median).
Structure[golden_final_5pct]: Videos at 95-99% percentile gain +8.0% above baseline vs -0.4% rest.
Structure[visceral_body_language]: Retention gain: painful +5.9%, curious +6.1%, numb +5.0%, stomach +5.1%. Sensory rate weight +1.59 in regression.
Structure[monotonic_rise]: Progression ↑↑↑ = 4.19M vs ↓↓↓ = 222K (19x gap). Every quarter beats the last.
Structure[fast_pacing_no_pauses]: Speech rate r=+0.24 vs retention. Pauses >1s r=-0.22. Transitions ('so', 'however') drop -11.2% / -8.6%.
Structure[nadir_before_climax]: best_after_worst 3.3M vs best_before_worst 650K (5x).
Duration[sweet_spot_46_60] 52s: 50-55s = 2.88M avg views. 40-55s safe range. 15-30s = death zone.

top_indicators.quantification: The gap between hook above_baseline and payoff above_baseline. NEGATIVE correlation = over-delivery wins. Videos where the ending exceeds the hook promise get 9x more views.
top_indicators.design_rule: The ending MUST exceed the opening promise. Never frontload your best content. Build to a climax that surpasses the hook.

top_indicators.quantification: Above-baseline retention at 80-95% of the video. The single strongest zone predictor. Q4 videos average +0.055 here while Q1 averages -0.089.
top_indicators.design_rule: Save the biggest payoff for the final 15%. The ending matters 8.5x more than the hook for total views.

top_indicators.quantification: Longest sustained run of above-baseline retention. Mean run = 50 points. % time above baseline also r=+0.47. Sustained quality > dramatic peaks.
top_indicators.design_rule: Consistency beats spikes. One long above-baseline run is worth more than multiple isolated peaks.

top_indicators.quantification: Later drops are 2.15x steeper than early drops (-0.129 vs -0.060). And late drops are almost never recovered (3/472). Position × severity interaction.
top_indicators.design_rule: A drop at 70% is fatal. A drop at 20% can be recovered. Front-load any risky content.

top_indicators.quantification: MORE retention peaks = FEWER views. Fewer, bigger dramatic moments > many small ones. Peak/drop ratio also inversely predicts (r=-0.33).
top_indicators.design_rule: Don't try to pack in multiple peaks. Build one clear narrative arc with one major payoff.

top_indicators.quantification: GPT-4o-mini vision: face more visible at drops (3.51) than peaks (3.20). Text more present at drops (3.73 vs 3.40). Face alone doesn't retain — face + explaining + text = drop. Face + action = peak.
top_indicators.rule: Never have Tyler just talking to camera with text overlays. If his face is on screen, he must be DOING something physical.
top_indicators.why: GPT-4o-mini vision: face more visible at drops (3.51) than peaks (3.20). Text more present at drops (3.73 vs 3.40). Face alone doesn't retain — face + explaining + text = drop. Face + action = peak.

top_indicators.quantification: Viewer fatigue r=-0.31: later drops 2.15x steeper. Only 3/472 late drops were recovered. Once viewers start leaving in the back half, they don't come back.
top_indicators.rule: Never put boring content after 60%. Any setup/explanation must happen in the first 30%. The back half must be pure payoff.
top_indicators.why: Viewer fatigue r=-0.31: later drops 2.15x steeper. Only 3/472 late drops were recovered. Once viewers start leaving in the back half, they don't come back.

creator_fit.rationale: Creator-fit is derived purely from corpus indicators that empirically prefer maker/body/workshop DNA: title-level making/build keywords (pat_making_v2, title_making_keyword), workshop/hands-visible framing (visual_is_workshop, pre_workshop_x_making, tension_x_workshop), sensory-over-technical language (top peak/drop causes), and feasible single-shot visible-proof endpoints (HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES, end_begin_ratio). Every weight in computeCreatorFit() cites a specific indicator; no hand-curated creator taste is added beyond what these indicators already imply.

top_indicators.quantification: Title contains making/build/creat/construct — 34 videos avg 19.7M vs 5.6M

top_indicators.why: highest-value single title-word pattern in corpus

top_indicators.quantification: Video shot in workshop-like environment (42/203 positive, 2.6x)
Action frames appear 28% at peaks vs 8% at drops

top_indicators.why: single-shot visible payoff structure rewards transformation/build endings

creator_fit.filter: indicators with published r/r_partial/delta_r2 in the evidence lattice above a minimum effect threshold

drivers_triggered.source: inverse of visual_is_workshop (r=+0.236); HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES peak cause favors tactile fixed framing over roaming outdoor
top_3_peak_causes.PHYSICAL_SENSORY_LANGUAGE (sensory-rate regression weight +1.59; per-word positive deltas +0.04-0.06 above-baseline in word-retention-impact.json)
HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES peak cause + wave11_12.end_begin_ratio (numeric counter freeze = single-shot visible payoff)

creator_fit.selection_effect: Added to the combo score so the diversity pass and MMR fill both reward maker/body/workshop alignment at the concrete premise level.

proof_clarity.rationale: Proof-clarity rewards ideas with a single-shot legible payoff: build+test hybrids (verb combo match), body-transformation with an explicit before/after anchor (same shot / weigh-in / day 1 vs day N), numeric endpoints with a named artifact in frame (counter/overlay/stack/tower/hull/pedals). Penalizes abstract observation/identity payoffs without artifacts, head/feeling-framed low-action payoffs, and repetition_outreach stacks whose contents are untestable to the viewer. The signal is factual — it reads the title premise line, logline_action, first_frame_action, visual_action_short, endpoint.kind, action_intensity, and body_part_phrase — not taste.

top_indicators.quantification: Action-frame share at best vs worst moments (28% vs 8%)
top_indicators.why: the proof MOMENT is an action frame — visible build/test/body/counter state in one shot
single-shot before/after / build-test / counter-freeze payoff structure
body/physical payoff reads on camera; cognitive payoff does not
object interaction makes the proof legible vs face-only reaction

proof_clarity.filter: factual premise fields × endpoint kind — each driver exposes the matched verb/anchor/artifact and the corpus indicator it cites

drivers_triggered.source: top_3_peak_causes.HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES + wave11_12.end_begin_ratio — numeric counter freeze is single-shot legible proof
first_frame_action / visual_action_short names a physical artifact or overlay — HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES peak cause (artifact visible in the proof shot)

proof_clarity.selection_effect: Added to the combo score so the diversity pass, MMR fill, AND the final blueprint re-rank all reward single-shot visible proof at the concrete premise level.

visual_legibility.rationale: Visual-legibility is endpoint-independent. It reads the concrete premise on six axes — (1) invisible body_part_phrase, (2) cognitive verb without a physical-action verb, (3) explicit cognitive-surface copy, (4) title premise line reveal phrasing classified physical-reveal vs verbal/observational, (5) frame-1 comprehensibility (action verb + gauge/object in first_frame_action), (6) state-contrast in visual_action_short — plus a mystery/identity frame-signal check. Designed to catch premises that gamed proof-clarity via cosmetic proof tokens ("stack of flashcards", "tally", "count overlay") while the actual reveal was a verbal quiz, a social observation, or a cognitive verdict. Every driver exposes the matched phrase or stem and cites an on-disk corpus indicator; no rejected category layer; no hand-picked top 5.

top_indicators.quantification: Action frames appear 28% at peaks vs 8% at drops
top_indicators.why: frame-1 comprehensibility IS an action frame at t=0s — action verb in first_frame_action is the opening-second proxy for this cause
visible body_part_phrase (foot/shoulders/stomach/hand) has a surface to film; feeling/head/mind/brain/memory do not
title premise line reveal phrasing classified: physical single-shot reveals align, verbal/observational reveals regress
state-contrast in visual_action_short (cut between, growing stack, slides out, pedals turning) is the hands-on-object axis applied across the build

top_indicators.quantification: Title contains making/build/creat/construct — 34 videos avg 19.7M vs 5.6M
top_indicators.why: title_making_keyword pattern aligns with physical reveal phrasing

visual_legibility.filter: six factual premise axes + title string — each driver exposes the matched stem/phrase/body-part and the corpus indicator it cites

drivers_triggered.source: body_parts lists at least one visible limb/torso — cuts to per-beat close-ups legible; top_3_peak_causes.PHYSICAL_SENSORY_LANGUAGE
physical-action verb stem present in premise copy — the daily act is filmable action; top_3_peak_causes.HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES

endpoint is numeric/body/build_test AND the premise has no builtin reveal — composeTitle() appends a single-frame freeze ("The Counter Froze At N" / "The Timer Hit N Exactly" / "The Mile Counter Froze At N" / "My {part} Quit First" / "The Build Held Until N"); wave11_12.end_begin_ratio

visual_action_short names a state→state change (cut between, day1 vs dayN, growing stack/pile/tower, slides out, pedals turning, mile-counter) — wave11_12.end_begin_ratio (legible progress / before-after)

visual_legibility.selection_effect: Added to the combo score alongside proof_clarity so the diversity-aware selector, MMR fill, AND the final blueprint re-rank all push cognitive/abstract/verbal-reveal premises below zero before any top-5 slot is assigned.

summary.note: Raw totals sum across traces and can double-count indicators reused in multiple sections. "unique_indicator_keys_used" deduplicates.

why_it_works: Specific premise (I Marched With A Weighted Backpack For 30 Miles — The Mile Counter Froze At 30.3 miles) — every concrete choice (object, timer, endpoint) survives the validation filter below.
Arc = steady_rise with nadir placed at ~17% (best_after_worst 5x gap).
Hook-retention@20s modeled high (86.8%) — first-20s is the single strongest view predictor (r=0.6).
Over-delivery structure: hook promises less than the 95% payoff delivers (hook_payoff_gap rewards over-delivery, r=-0.52).
Vocabulary: commits to 9 peak words and avoids 6 material-class words.

Proof-clarity: score=0.34 from 2 drivers (build+test hybrid, body before/after anchor, numeric counter + named artifact) — single-shot legible payoff backed by HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES + end_begin_ratio.

Visual-legibility: score=0.46 from 4 drivers (+4/-0) — frame-1 comprehensibility + decisive physical reveal in title + state-contrast in the cut-to; penalizes invisible body parts, cognitive verbs, and verbal/observational reveals regardless of endpoint kind.
Validation trace: 19 blueprint sections and 5 modeled metrics carry explicit indicator lineage (pool size, filter, top indicators w/ r/rho/csw and quantification).

ideas.title: I Did 2,000 Push-Ups In One Day — My Shoulders Quit First
ideas.one_line_premise: I push push-ups out one rep at a time in my garage, narrating every sensation in my shoulders until my shoulders quits first.

concept.title: I Did 2,000 Push-Ups In One Day — My Shoulders Quit First
concept.logline: I push push-ups out one rep at a time in my garage, narrating every sensation in my shoulders until my shoulders quits first.
concept.promise: You're watching me push push-ups out one rep at a time — the question is where my shoulders gives out.
concept.payoff: Final 5% of runtime: my shoulders quits first; a single sensation word appears as overlay.
concept.over_delivery_note: Hook implies a round target (2,000); payoff lands on a specific, non-round value (2,000) — specificity over-delivers vs the rounded promise.

opening.first_frame: Close on mid-rep with the counter visible. Counter visible. No explanatory overlay; composition emphasizes direct address (rho=0.14 vs log_views).
opening.first_line: Go — 2,000, and my shoulders are going to tell you when it's over.
opening.opening_action: Camera locked on a push-up from the top of the motion for the first 3 seconds; I enter motion inside the first second.

build_phases.beat: enter my garage; a push-up from the top of the motion; premise named on screen
build_phases.note: Concept + body inside first 10%. Design rule v3 #6 (5.4x gap).

build_phases.beat: first shoulders sensation narration ("my shoulders is bigger"); counter begins to tick
build_phases.note: Divergence lock-in at ~22%. Sensory-word ramp begins.

build_phases.beat: escalating a push-up from the top of the motion with sensory updates; utterances < 10 words; no pauses > 1s
build_phases.note: Monotonic rise in distress / counter. Peak-word density increases.

build_phases.beat: peak zone — slow to 3.0 w/s; short sentence on a single sensation; reaction → wide on the count or distance milestone
build_phases.note: Peak 60-80%. Peak-speaking-rate 3.86 wps confirmed; utterance 7.9 words.

build_phases.beat: my shoulders quits first; single-word overlay (sensation); wide shot of the final state
build_phases.note: Golden final 5% + END_RECOVERY. Emotion word in final 10% = +0.069.

climax_and_payoff.climax_hint: At 95% of runtime, my shoulders quits first; camera holds on the final position; I say one word and the overlay freezes.
climax_and_payoff.closing_line_hint: Close with shoulders + impact word: "shoulders's numb — insane."

hook_quarter: a push-up from the top of the motion
mid: alternate shoulders close-ups with a push-up from the top of the motion
text overlay at beat moments only

duration_target.evidence: 50-55s = 2.88M avg views. 40-55s safe range. 15-30s = death zone.

drivers.source: indicator_registry.visual_is_workshop r_direct=+0.236 (42/203 pos, 2.6x); pre_workshop_x_making r_partial=+0.229; tension_x_workshop r_partial=+0.283
top_3_peak_causes.PHYSICAL_SENSORY_LANGUAGE (sensory-rate regression weight +1.59; per-word positive deltas +0.04-0.06 above-baseline in word-retention-impact.json)
tactile frame preserved without triggering TECHNICAL_MATERIAL_LANGUAGE drop cause — sensory > technical axis

creator_fit.note: Creator-fit is added to the combo score so the diversity-aware selector rewards maker/body/workshop alignment at the concrete premise level. Weights derived from indicator strengths above — no hand-curated creator taste beyond what the corpus already implies.

drivers.source: first_frame_action / visual_action_short names a physical artifact or overlay — HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES peak cause (artifact visible in the proof shot)

derived_from_indicators: retention-patterns.top_3_peak_causes.HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES (28% at peaks vs 8% at drops — action frames ARE the proof moment)
proof_clarity.note: Proof-clarity rewards single-shot legible payoffs (build+test hybrids, body before/after anchors, numeric counter freeze + named artifact) and penalizes observation/identity endpoints with no artifact, cognitive/head-framed payoffs, and stacks whose contents are untestable to the viewer. Added to the combo score so the diversity-aware selector and final re-rank both reward mechanism visibility at the concrete premise level. No hand-picked top-5 — every weight reads a factual premise field and cites a corpus indicator.

drivers.source: body_parts lists at least one visible limb/torso — cuts to per-beat close-ups legible; top_3_peak_causes.PHYSICAL_SENSORY_LANGUAGE
physical-action verb stem present in premise copy — the daily act is filmable action; top_3_peak_causes.HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES

endpoint is numeric/body/build_test AND the premise has no builtin reveal — composeTitle() appends a single-frame freeze ("The Counter Froze At N" / "The Timer Hit N Exactly" / "The Mile Counter Froze At N" / "My {part} Quit First" / "The Build Held Until N"); wave11_12.end_begin_ratio
first_frame_action names an action verb + at least one of {gauge, physical object} — the challenge is legible at t=0s; HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES peak cause applied at the opening

derived_from_indicators: retention-patterns.top_3_peak_causes.HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES (28% at peaks vs 8% at drops — action frame at t=0s IS comprehension)
visual_legibility.note: Visual-legibility is endpoint-independent. It reads the concrete premise along six axes (invisible body part, cognitive verb without physical action, explicit cognitive surface, title-payoff phrasing, frame-1 comprehensibility, and visual state-contrast) plus an identity/mystery frame-signal check. Designed to catch premises that pass proof-clarity via cosmetic artifact tokens ("stack", "tally", "count overlay") while the actual reveal is a verbal quiz, a social observation, or a cognitive verdict. No rejected category layer — the six axes are factual premise fields plus the title string. No hand-picked top 5.

validated_premise_signature.action_line: push push-ups out one rep at a time

derived_from_lattice: visual_prescription_hints.* ← mechanism_indicator_links (frame_*) ranked by |rho| per zone
creator_fit ← pat_making_v2 + visual_is_workshop + pre_workshop_x_making + tension_x_workshop + PHYSICAL_SENSORY_LANGUAGE vs TECHNICAL_MATERIAL_LANGUAGE + HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES + end_begin_ratio

proof_clarity ← HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES (action frames IS the proof shot) + end_begin_ratio (single-shot before/after) + title_making_keyword (build+test hybrids) + inverse on abstract/cognitive/untestable-stack payoffs

visual_legibility ← HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES (action verb + gauge/object in frame 1) + PHYSICAL_SENSORY_LANGUAGE (visible body_part_phrase) + end_begin_ratio (title reveal phrasing classified physical vs verbal/observational) + visual_is_workshop (state-contrast in visual_action_short) + inverse on invisible body_parts / cognitive verbs / explicit cognitive-surface copy / verbal-reveal titles / non-comprehensible frame-1 / observation-only identity or mystery cuts

evidence: Hook[compound_frame_close_up_X_segment_setup_at_first_10s] via swipe_away_rate (principle princ_00034, n=65, csw=-0.148).
Structure[late_peak_arc]: Retention pattern: videos peaking at 60-80% get ~10x more views than early-peaking (5.2M vs 530K median).
Structure[golden_final_5pct]: Videos at 95-99% percentile gain +8.0% above baseline vs -0.4% rest.
Structure[visceral_body_language]: Retention gain: painful +5.9%, curious +6.1%, numb +5.0%, stomach +5.1%. Sensory rate weight +1.59 in regression.
Structure[monotonic_rise]: Progression ↑↑↑ = 4.19M vs ↓↓↓ = 222K (19x gap). Every quarter beats the last.
Structure[fast_pacing_no_pauses]: Speech rate r=+0.24 vs retention. Pauses >1s r=-0.22. Transitions ('so', 'however') drop -11.2% / -8.6%.
Structure[nadir_before_climax]: best_after_worst 3.3M vs best_before_worst 650K (5x).
Duration[sweet_spot_46_60] 52s: 50-55s = 2.88M avg views. 40-55s safe range. 15-30s = death zone.
Pre-upload lever[hook_word_ratio]: r=-0.2693, lower → more views.
Pre-upload lever[visual_variety_entropy]: r=0.2692, higher → more views.
Pre-upload lever[transcript_word_count]: r=0.2639, higher → more views.
Pre-upload lever[transcript_char_count]: r=0.2557, higher → more views.

top_indicators.quantification: The gap between hook above_baseline and payoff above_baseline. NEGATIVE correlation = over-delivery wins. Videos where the ending exceeds the hook promise get 9x more views.
top_indicators.design_rule: The ending MUST exceed the opening promise. Never frontload your best content. Build to a climax that surpasses the hook.

top_indicators.quantification: Above-baseline retention at 80-95% of the video. The single strongest zone predictor. Q4 videos average +0.055 here while Q1 averages -0.089.
top_indicators.design_rule: Save the biggest payoff for the final 15%. The ending matters 8.5x more than the hook for total views.

top_indicators.quantification: Longest sustained run of above-baseline retention. Mean run = 50 points. % time above baseline also r=+0.47. Sustained quality > dramatic peaks.
top_indicators.design_rule: Consistency beats spikes. One long above-baseline run is worth more than multiple isolated peaks.

top_indicators.quantification: Later drops are 2.15x steeper than early drops (-0.129 vs -0.060). And late drops are almost never recovered (3/472). Position × severity interaction.
top_indicators.design_rule: A drop at 70% is fatal. A drop at 20% can be recovered. Front-load any risky content.

top_indicators.quantification: MORE retention peaks = FEWER views. Fewer, bigger dramatic moments > many small ones. Peak/drop ratio also inversely predicts (r=-0.33).
top_indicators.design_rule: Don't try to pack in multiple peaks. Build one clear narrative arc with one major payoff.

creator_fit.rationale: Creator-fit is derived purely from corpus indicators that empirically prefer maker/body/workshop DNA: title-level making/build keywords (pat_making_v2, title_making_keyword), workshop/hands-visible framing (visual_is_workshop, pre_workshop_x_making, tension_x_workshop), sensory-over-technical language (top peak/drop causes), and feasible single-shot visible-proof endpoints (HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES, end_begin_ratio). Every weight in computeCreatorFit() cites a specific indicator; no hand-curated creator taste is added beyond what these indicators already imply.

tactile frame preserved without triggering TECHNICAL_MATERIAL_LANGUAGE drop cause — sensory > technical axis

creator_fit.selection_effect: Added to the combo score so the diversity pass and MMR fill both reward maker/body/workshop alignment at the concrete premise level.

proof_clarity.rationale: Proof-clarity rewards ideas with a single-shot legible payoff: build+test hybrids (verb combo match), body-transformation with an explicit before/after anchor (same shot / weigh-in / day 1 vs day N), numeric endpoints with a named artifact in frame (counter/overlay/stack/tower/hull/pedals). Penalizes abstract observation/identity payoffs without artifacts, head/feeling-framed low-action payoffs, and repetition_outreach stacks whose contents are untestable to the viewer. The signal is factual — it reads the title premise line, logline_action, first_frame_action, visual_action_short, endpoint.kind, action_intensity, and body_part_phrase — not taste.

top_indicators.quantification: Action-frame share at best vs worst moments (28% vs 8%)
top_indicators.why: the proof MOMENT is an action frame — visible build/test/body/counter state in one shot
single-shot before/after / build-test / counter-freeze payoff structure
body/physical payoff reads on camera; cognitive payoff does not
object interaction makes the proof legible vs face-only reaction

proof_clarity.filter: factual premise fields × endpoint kind — each driver exposes the matched verb/anchor/artifact and the corpus indicator it cites

drivers_triggered.source: first_frame_action / visual_action_short names a physical artifact or overlay — HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES peak cause (artifact visible in the proof shot)

proof_clarity.selection_effect: Added to the combo score so the diversity pass, MMR fill, AND the final blueprint re-rank all reward single-shot visible proof at the concrete premise level.

visual_legibility.rationale: Visual-legibility is endpoint-independent. It reads the concrete premise on six axes — (1) invisible body_part_phrase, (2) cognitive verb without a physical-action verb, (3) explicit cognitive-surface copy, (4) title premise line reveal phrasing classified physical-reveal vs verbal/observational, (5) frame-1 comprehensibility (action verb + gauge/object in first_frame_action), (6) state-contrast in visual_action_short — plus a mystery/identity frame-signal check. Designed to catch premises that gamed proof-clarity via cosmetic proof tokens ("stack of flashcards", "tally", "count overlay") while the actual reveal was a verbal quiz, a social observation, or a cognitive verdict. Every driver exposes the matched phrase or stem and cites an on-disk corpus indicator; no rejected category layer; no hand-picked top 5.

top_indicators.quantification: Action frames appear 28% at peaks vs 8% at drops
top_indicators.why: frame-1 comprehensibility IS an action frame at t=0s — action verb in first_frame_action is the opening-second proxy for this cause
visible body_part_phrase (foot/shoulders/stomach/hand) has a surface to film; feeling/head/mind/brain/memory do not
title premise line reveal phrasing classified: physical single-shot reveals align, verbal/observational reveals regress
state-contrast in visual_action_short (cut between, growing stack, slides out, pedals turning) is the hands-on-object axis applied across the build

top_indicators.quantification: Title contains making/build/creat/construct — 34 videos avg 19.7M vs 5.6M
top_indicators.why: title_making_keyword pattern aligns with physical reveal phrasing

visual_legibility.filter: six factual premise axes + title string — each driver exposes the matched stem/phrase/body-part and the corpus indicator it cites

drivers_triggered.source: body_parts lists at least one visible limb/torso — cuts to per-beat close-ups legible; top_3_peak_causes.PHYSICAL_SENSORY_LANGUAGE
physical-action verb stem present in premise copy — the daily act is filmable action; top_3_peak_causes.HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES

endpoint is numeric/body/build_test AND the premise has no builtin reveal — composeTitle() appends a single-frame freeze ("The Counter Froze At N" / "The Timer Hit N Exactly" / "The Mile Counter Froze At N" / "My {part} Quit First" / "The Build Held Until N"); wave11_12.end_begin_ratio
first_frame_action names an action verb + at least one of {gauge, physical object} — the challenge is legible at t=0s; HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES peak cause applied at the opening

visual_legibility.selection_effect: Added to the combo score alongside proof_clarity so the diversity-aware selector, MMR fill, AND the final blueprint re-rank all push cognitive/abstract/verbal-reveal premises below zero before any top-5 slot is assigned.

summary.note: Raw totals sum across traces and can double-count indicators reused in multiple sections. "unique_indicator_keys_used" deduplicates.

why_it_works: Specific premise (I Did 2,000 Push-Ups In One Day — My Shoulders Quit First) — every concrete choice (object, timer, endpoint) survives the validation filter below.
Arc = steady_rise with nadir placed at ~17% (best_after_worst 5x gap).
Hook-retention@20s modeled high (86.8%) — first-20s is the single strongest view predictor (r=0.6).
Over-delivery structure: hook promises less than the 95% payoff delivers (hook_payoff_gap rewards over-delivery, r=-0.52).
Vocabulary: commits to 8 peak words and avoids 6 material-class words.

Proof-clarity: score=0.12 from 1 drivers (build+test hybrid, body before/after anchor, numeric counter + named artifact) — single-shot legible payoff backed by HIGH_ENERGY_ACTION_FRAMES + end_begin_ratio.

Visual-legibility: score=0.48 from 4 drivers (+4/-0) — frame-1 comprehensibility + decisive physical reveal in title + state-contrast in the cut-to; penalizes invisible body parts, cognitive verbs, and verbal/observational reveals regardless of endpoint kind.
Validation trace: 19 blueprint sections and 5 modeled metrics carry explicit indicator lineage (pool size, filter, top indicators w/ r/rho/csw and quantification).
